content: Early-stage SaaS without SOC 2 should signal trust by honestly documenting real controls: MFA on repos/consoles, role-based permissions, access/audit logs, encryption in transit and at rest, centralized logging, and monitoring. Transparency about maturity level builds trust; fabricated badges destroy it. A simple public security page or trust-center listing actual practices (auth provider, data isolation model, audit trail, backup posture) plus a roadmap/commitment statement accelerates evaluation. Never claim certifications you don't hold.
